module.name: jsdoc-helpers
module.description: Shared JSDoc-comment helper functions used by JSDoc-enforcement rules.

scenarios.name: should return true for a block comment whose value starts with '*'
scenarios.given: a comment token of type Block with a value starting with '*'

scenarios.name: should return false for a block comment whose value does not start with '*'
scenarios.given: a comment token of type Block with a value not starting with '*'

scenarios.name: should return false for a line comment
scenarios.given: a comment token of type Line

scenarios.name: should return true for MethodDefinition
scenarios.given: an AST_NODE_TYPES value of MethodDefinition

scenarios.name: should return true for ExportDefaultDeclaration
scenarios.given: an AST_NODE_TYPES value of ExportDefaultDeclaration

scenarios.name: should return false for a type that does not own JSDoc placement
scenarios.given: an AST_NODE_TYPES value not in the owned set (e.g. Identifier)

scenarios.name: should return null when there are no comments before the node
scenarios.given: a node with no preceding comments

scenarios.name: should return null when preceding comments are not JSDoc block comments
scenarios.given: a node preceded only by line or plain block comments

scenarios.name: should return the JSDoc block comment when one is present
scenarios.given: a node preceded by a JSDoc block comment

scenarios.name: should return the last JSDoc comment when multiple are present
scenarios.given: a node preceded by multiple JSDoc block comments
scenarios.then: returns the last JSDoc comment object

scenarios.name: should return the leading whitespace of the line containing the node
scenarios.given: a node on an indented line

scenarios.name: should return an empty string when the line has no indentation
scenarios.given: a node on a line with no leading whitespace

scenarios.name: should return an empty string when the line index is out of range
scenarios.given: a node whose computed line index falls outside the lines array

scenarios.name: should return the parent node when its type is in the owned set
scenarios.given: a function node whose parent type is MethodDefinition

scenarios.name: should return null when the parent type is not in the owned set
scenarios.given: a function node whose parent type is Program

scenarios.name: should return the parent node when it owns JSDoc placement
scenarios.given: a function node whose parent is a MethodDefinition

scenarios.name: should return the variable declaration when the parent is a VariableDeclarator
scenarios.given: a function node assigned to a single-entry variable declaration

scenarios.name: should return the function node itself when no ownership applies
scenarios.given: a function node with an unowned parent (e.g. Program)

scenarios.name: should return null when the parent is not a VariableDeclarator
scenarios.given: a function node whose parent is a Program node

scenarios.name: should return the VariableDeclarator itself when there are multiple declarations
scenarios.given: a function node inside a declaration with more than one declarator

scenarios.name: should return the VariableDeclaration for a single non-exported declaration
scenarios.given: a function node assigned to a single-entry const not within an export

scenarios.name: should return the ExportNamedDeclaration for a single exported declaration
scenarios.given: a function node assigned to a single-entry const within an ExportNamedDeclaration

scenarios.name: should return true when only whitespace precedes the node on its line
scenarios.given: a node at column 0 or after only spaces on its line

scenarios.name: should return false when non-whitespace code precedes the node on the same line
scenarios.given: a node after non-whitespace text on the same line

scenarios.name: should return true when the line index is out of range
scenarios.given: a node whose line index falls outside the source lines array
